posting.unionName: International Union of Operating Engineers Local 158
posting.locationSummary: Central, Finger Lakes, Mohawk Valley, North Country, and Southern Tier regions of New York
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at IUOE Local #158, District #545 in Cicero during the recruitment period. Applications are limited, must be completed on site, and must be received by June 23, 2026 or when 40 applications have been issued.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: International Union of Operating Engineers Local #158, District #545, 5612 Business Avenue, Cicero, NY 13039
posting.applicationHours: 7:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., Monday through Friday, during the recruitment period
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Limited-application recruitment. Only 40 applications will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis. Recruitment will run for 10 business days or until 40 applications have been issued, whichever comes first. Applications must be completed on the premises and received no later than June 23, 2026.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old; proof required at acceptance into the program.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as GED or TASC; proof required at acceptance into the program.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #545, including Cayuga, Cortland, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, St. Lawrence, Seneca, or Tompkins counties.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must possess a valid driver’s license to operate company vehicles and have reliable transportation to and from work sites and related instruction classes.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug/alcohol test at the sponsor’s expense after selection and before enrollment; apprentices may also be subject to random drug testing during the apprenticeship.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend related instruction classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old; proof will be required at time of acceptance into the program.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma (such as GED or TASC); proof will be required at time of acceptance into the program.

Must attest in writing that they are physically able to perform the work of an operating engineer, including lifting heavy objects, working in confined spaces, working with and/or operating hazardous machinery, working in extremely dusty conditions, working in extremely hot, cold, or damp weather, working over water, working from heights, and possible exposure to loud noises and respiratory irritants.

Must pass a drug/alcohol test, at the expense of the sponsor, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship; apprentices may be subject to random drug testing at any time during the apprenticeship.
Must reside within the jurisdiction of Local Union #545, which includes Cayuga, Cortland, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, St. Lawrence, Seneca, or Tompkins counties.
Must be able to read, hear, and understand verbal instructions and warnings given in English.

Must have at least one year of trade-related experience, or have successfully completed a construction-related pre-apprenticeship, or have successfully completed a construction-related training program.
Must possess a valid driver’s license in order to operate company vehicles; proof will be required at time of acceptance into the program.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various work sites and related instruction classes at the approved school.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be 18 or older, have a high school diploma or equivalent, live in the listed Local 545 counties, have trade or pre-apprenticeship experience, hold a valid driver’s license, have reliable transportation, and be able to pass drug testing and the physical demands of the work.
posting.contactSummary: Contact IUOE LU 158 Training Fund District #545 at (315) 299-6104 for more information.
